## Safety checklist

- [ ] No secrets, credentials, private prompts, or sensitive manifests committed
- [ ] Cloud resources, if any, were cleaned up or cleanup steps are documented
- [ ] User-visible docs were updated where needed
- [ ] Limitations or compatibility assumptions are documented
